items.title: Updates for Codex and ChatGPT Work users.
items.title_zh: Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 用户的更新。
items.description: Updates for Codex and ChatGPT Work users. No nerfing, only good stuff! - We have landed inference optimizations and are passing down savings to all the subscriptions for GPT-5.6 Sol. That should result in around 10% more usage on its own.…
items.description_zh: Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 用户的更新。没有削弱，只有好东西！ - 我们已经实现了推理优化，并将节省的成本传递给 GPT-5.6 Sol 的所有订阅。这应该会导致使用量增加大约 10%。...

items.title: Team, Edu, ...
items.description: Team, Edu, ... and any other paid subscription too. Quite simple really.
items.description_zh: Team、Edu...以及任何其他付费订阅。真的很简单。

items.title: Rest assured that GPT 5.6 Sol will stay in the ChatGPT subscription you pay for.
items.title_zh: 请放心，GPT 5.6 Sol 将保留在您支付的 ChatGPT 订阅中。
items.description: Rest assured that GPT 5.6 Sol will stay in the ChatGPT subscription you pay for. Including Go, Plus and Pro subscriptions. At least until we ship an even better model.
items.description_zh: 请放心，GPT 5.6 Sol 将保留在您支付的 ChatGPT 订阅中。包括 Go、Plus 和 Pro 订阅。至少在我们推出更好的模型之前是这样。

items.title: Seeing this quite often today.
items.title_zh: 今天经常看到这种情况。
items.description: Seeing this quite often today. My wild guess is 90%+ of people are using GPT 5.6 Sol and <10% are using Terra or Luna. https://t.co/uiCunQ1sLK
items.description_zh: 今天经常看到这种情况。我的大胆猜测是 90% 以上的人正在使用 GPT 5.6 Sol，而 <10% 的人正在使用 Terra 或 Luna。 https://t.co/uiCunQ1sLK

items.title: There's a tendancy when community sentiment turns to communicate less and in a more corpo…
items.title_zh: 当社区情绪转向更少的交流和更多的公司化时，就会出现一种趋势……
items.description: There's a tendancy when community sentiment turns to communicate less and in a more corporate way. I think it's important to do the reverse - communicate in a more human way, be transparent with the community about what's going on, figure…
items.description_zh: 当社区情绪转向减少沟通并以更加企业化的方式进行时，就会出现一种趋势。我认为反其道而行之很重要——以更人性化的方式进行沟通，对社区保持透明，了解正在发生的事情，想想……

items.title: Anthropic makes great models too but I don't understand why they communicate like this.
items.title_zh: 人择也能做出很棒的模型，但我不明白为什么他们会这样交流。
items.description: Anthropic makes great models too but I don't understand why they communicate like this. I think they need to engage the community more directly like what OpenAI is doing. https://t.co/BqYu5FglYV
items.description_zh: 人择也能做出很棒的模型，但我不明白为什么他们会这样交流。我认为他们需要像 OpenAI 所做的那样更直接地与社区互动。 https://t.co/BqYu5FglYV

items.title: Vibe Research Fine-tuning a Qwen-8b model to play chess on Replit.

items.description: Vibe Research Fine-tuning a Qwen-8b model to play chess on Replit. Running 3 parallel branches with different experiments and making real progress. It's amazing how far models have come in their ability to do ML (they used to be really bad…
items.description_zh: Vibe Research 微调 Qwen-8b 模型以在 Replit 上下棋。运行 3 个并行分支进行不同的实验并取得实际进展。令人惊讶的是，模型在机器学习方面的能力已经取得了如此大的进步（它们曾经非常糟糕......

items.title: Make the model a cog in a machine you own.
items.title_zh: 使模型成为您拥有的机器中的一个齿轮。
items.description: Make the model a cog in a machine you own. ◾ AI SDK → open model API ◾ https://t.co/O7y9dmUqk5 → open Agent API ◾ AI Gateway → open ZDR inference Startups and enterprises must own their data, evals, model choices, software layer. Don't out…
items.description_zh: 使模型成为您拥有的机器中的一个齿轮。 ◾ AI SDK → 开放模型 API ◾ https://t.co/O7y9dmUqk5 → 开放代理 API ◾ AI 网关 → 开放 ZDR 推理 初创公司和企业必须拥有自己的数据、评估、模型选择、软件层。别出去……
